nameEn: Edward VII, King of the United Kingdom
nameEs: Eduardo VII, Rey del Reino Unido
nameIt: Edoardo VII, Re del Regno Unito
descriptionEn: King Edward VII, depicted in the uniform of a Field Marshal of the British Army, 1904. Known as the "Peacemaker" for his diplomatic skill, Edward is shown with the regalia of the Order of the Garter — England's oldest order of chivalry.
descriptionEs: El Rey Eduardo VII, representado con el uniforme de Mariscal de Campo del Ejército Británico, 1904.
descriptionIt: Re Edoardo VII, raffigurato in uniforme da Feldmaresciallo dell'Esercito Britannico, 1904.
